news.title: Jim Cramer questions whether Wednesday's rally in Big Tech will have staying power
news.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer warned that Wednesday's rally in tech may have gotten carried away from fundamentals.

news.title: Trump blasts New York AI data center moratorium, says state should change policy 'immediately'
news.summary: New York became the first state in the U.S. to impose a ban of its kind when the governor signed the executive order Tuesday.

news.title: Amazon senior cloud executive departs after 18 years
news.summary: Brown helped launch one of AWS' oldest services and also oversaw its compute and machine learning units.

news.title: Why Jim Cramer is shocked by Citi's against-the-grain praise of Microsoft's Copilot
news.summary: Jim Cramer said on CNBC on Wednesday that Citi's optimism is contrary to everything he has been hearing about Copilot being subpar.

news.title: Anthropic moves closer to mega-IPO as bankers line up investor meetings
news.summary: Anthropic is lining up investor meetings ahead of a potential IPO as soon as October as the AI startup behind looks to beat rival OpenAI to the public markets.

news.title: SpaceX stock sinks below $135 IPO price for the first time
news.summary: SpaceX shares fell for a fourth-straight session on Wednesday days after entering the Nasdaq-100

news.title: DTCC, Wall Street’s post-trade powerhouse, tests tokenized markets with industry heavy hitters
news.summary: The DTCC is pushing to bring tokenization of real world assets from concept to reality using existing financial infrastructure.

news.title: We're buying more of Jim Cramer's favorite chip stock for the second time this week
news.summary: We also added to our position on Monday.

news.title: Inflation cools, Morgan Stanley earnings, IBM's bad day and more in Morning Squawk
news.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

news.title: Alibaba’s U.S.-listed shares rise 4% after Qwen AI set to be integrated in Apple Intelligence
news.summary: The Cyberspace Administration of China on Wednesday included Apple's AI services on a list of approved providers.

news.title: Midnight social media curfew and limits to infinite scrolling proposed for older UK teens
news.summary: The U.K. government has proposed new measures to protect older teens on social media, including a midnight curfew and a limit to infinite scrolling.

news.title: ASML shares fall after hiking sales forecast for second time this year on strong AI chip demand
news.summary: ASML on Wednesday raised its guidance for a second time this year as its customers continue to ramp up their production capacity of AI chips.

news.title: Why Europe is suddenly betting big on drones
news.summary: Drones and autonomous systems are moving from niche battlefield tools to a core part of modern warfare.

news.title: SK Hynix South Korean shares jump 8% as Asia tech stocks rally
news.summary: SK Hynix led a broad rally in Asian technology shares on Wednesday, tracking a rebound in U.S. semiconductor shares after a sharp selloff earlier this week.

news.title: Data Center Firm Csquare Is Said to Price IPO at $21 Per Share
news.summary: Csquare Inc. priced its initial public offering at $21 per share, according to people familiar with the matter, below a marketed range.

news.title: China Sends Robots Out Into the World to Learn How to Be Human
news.summary: In an industrial park on the outskirts of Beijing, a humanoid arm picks up a bag of Lay’s potato chips and places it neatly along a row of snacks on a shelf. Nearby, a worker films himself grabbing cushions off a sofa and folding sheets on a bed, recording videos that will be used to develop brains for robots.

news.title: Nvidia’s Huang Says Vera Rubin on Track Despite Delay Talk
news.summary: Nvidia Corp. co-founder Jensen Huang stressed that the US company’s next-generation AI accelerator systems were in production and on track for delivery to customers, responding to reports that manufacturing snags may delay their rollout.

news.title: Apple Boosts AppleCare+ Monthly Prices by 50 Cents in Latest Increase
news.summary: Apple Inc. slightly raised the cost of individual AppleCare+ service subscriptions, marking its latest price increase in the face of a global memory shortage and other challenges.

news.title: PayPal Works With Goldman, Evercore as Stripe, Advent Make $50B-Plus Offer
news.summary: PayPal Holdings Inc. has been working with advisers to review strategic options, people familiar with the matter said, as Stripe Inc. and private equity firm Advent pursue a $50 billion-plus takeover of the fintech pioneer.

news.title: Microsoft Gives Sellers Tips to Knock Down Anthropic, OpenAI
news.summary: Microsoft Corp. is coaching its sales team on how to vigorously compete against Anthropic PBC and OpenAI, playing up shortcomings in products from the artificial intelligence firms.

news.title: Murati’s Thinking Machines Releases First AI Model for Broad Use
news.summary: Thinking Machines Lab is releasing its first AI model, more than a year after former OpenAI executive Mira Murati founded the artificial intelligence startup.

news.title: Palantir’s CTO Sees Chinese AI Models Posing Economic Risk to US
news.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. Chief Technology Officer Shyam Sankar said that China has developed a new vanguard of artificial intelligence models through unauthorized use of work produced by Silicon Valley AI developers, posing an economic threat to the US.

news.title: CIA Says AI Drones Give Russian Troops Only 30 Minutes to Live
news.summary: Russian soldiers only live an average of 20 to 30 minutes on the battlefield because of Ukraine’s artificial-intelligence attack drones, CIA Director John Ratcliffe said on Wednesday.

news.title: ASML Mulls Price Hike for Chipmaking Tools, Information Says
news.summary: ASML Holding NV plans to raise prices for its chipmaking equipment, potentially clashing with its biggest customer Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., according to a report in the Information citing people familiar with the matter.

news.title: Anthropic Plans IPO Investor Meetings as Mega-Listing Nears
news.summary: Anthropic PBC is seeking to meet with investors ahead of its potential mega-IPO, according to people familiar with the matter, as the company prepares to join the rush of artificial intelligence-driven stock market debuts.

news.title: Google to Allow Third-Party Stores in Its App Store Next Week
news.summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google told a California federal court that it will begin allowing US users to download third-party app stores within its Google Play Store beginning next week.

news.title: OnePlus, Once Popular with Tech Fans, to Pull Out of US and Europe
news.summary: OnePlus, a consumer electronics brand that gained a loyal following with its lineup of aggressively priced Android smartphones, will begin to cease operations in the US and Europe.

news.title: Missile Maker MBDA Names Airbus Veteran Dumont as New CEO
news.summary: Europe’s biggest missile maker, MBDA Missile Systems, appointed Airbus SE veteran Jean-Brice Dumont as chief executive officer as the group proceeds in its global expansion plans.

news.title: Older UK Teens Face Midnight Curfews on Social Media Apps
news.summary: Older British teenagers face a midnight curfew for accessing some social media apps and restrictions on addictive features, as the UK government increases the scope of its proposed ban on the services for younger kids.

news.title: Apple Gets Approval for iPhone AI in China With Alibaba, Baidu
news.summary: Apple Inc. on Wednesday received long-awaited government approval to roll out Apple Intelligence in China, potentially giving it a boost in the world’s most competitive smartphone market.

news.title: FBI Crackdown on Proxy Networks Rattles Obscure Industry
news.summary: The bureau has taken over websites belonging to Alarum Technologies Ltd.

news.title: Indian AI Startup Emergent Valued at $1.5 Billion in Round
news.summary: Emergent, a startup that helps small businesses build applications using artificial intelligence, has raised $130 million in a round that makes the company one of the few Indian AI startups to hit a unicorn valuation.

news.title: Hinge Debuts Friend's Take Feature, Letting Inner Circle Leave Testimonials
news.summary: Hinge is introducing a new feature called Friend’s Take that lets daters recruit people they know to leave testimonials on their profiles for other singles to see.

news.title: Nokia, Nvidia Unveil AI-Powered Network, Doubling Data Loads
news.summary: Nokia Oyj and Nvidia Corp. have developed network technology that uses artificial intelligence to double the amount of data that telecommunications companies can transmit, the first major announcement nine months into a partnership that also included Nvidia taking a stake in the Finnish network equipment maker.

news.title: Tesla driver in fatal Texas crash pressed accelerator 100%, NTSB confirms
news.summary: The safety board confirmed Tesla's account of the crash, which the company shared days after it happened last month.

news.title: Daniel Ek’s body-scanning startup Neko Health raises another $700M
news.summary: Neko Health has developed proprietary body-scanning technology, which it couples with bloodwork, to assess a person's health.

news.title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
news.summary: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

news.title: Microsoft patches bug in video game Age of Empires II
news.summary: The vulnerability in the decades-old game could have allowed hackers to take over victims’ computers with a malicious game invite.

news.title: Apple bans home services from its upcoming Maps ads
news.summary: Apple has published the policies governing its upcoming Maps advertising business, revealing a strategy that differs from Google’s. The new rules prohibit home services businesses like plumbers, electricians, locksmiths, and roofers from advertising on Apple Maps, along with several other sensitive categories, suggesting Apple is taking a more curated approach to these ads.

news.title: SpaceX falls to $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
news.summary: The stock has steadily fallen from the euphoric post-IPO high, showing that markets may be sobering up to the promises CEO Elon Musk made before and after SpaceX went public.

news.title: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
news.summary: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.

news.title: Phone maker OnePlus reportedly plans to wind down US and Europe operations
news.summary: OnePlus could also wind down its operations in India by 2027.

news.title: Google’s biggest clean power project is 40 miles north of xAI’s unpermitted gas power plant
news.summary: Google's biggest solar and battery project stands in sharp contrast with xAI's nearby unpermitted power plant.

news.title: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
news.summary: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.

news.title: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
news.summary: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new product categories.

news.title: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
news.summary: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

news.title: Stripe and Advent reportedly offered to buy PayPal for around $53.4B
news.summary: If completed, the acquisition would unite two of the biggest names in digital payments.

news.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba’s Qwen AI
news.summary: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

news.title: Inside Ode with Anthropic, the startup betting AI services are the future of enterprise
news.summary: Can a handful of engineers really do the work of an army of consultants? That’s the bet behind Ode with Anthropic — the joint venture dedicated to embedding forward-deployed engineers in enterprise firms, backed by Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Goldman Sachs and others.   On this episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, Rebecc...

news.title: Spotify expands parent-managed accounts to users on its free tier
news.summary: The feature was previously only available to paid subscribers.

news.title: India bets billions on breaking China’s grip on smartphone manufacturing
news.summary: New Delhi announced a $6.5 billion smartphone manufacturing program and a $13.3 billion semiconductor push to deepen India's electronics supply chain.

news.title: US charges Russian ‘bulletproof’ web hosts over cyberattacks that netted $62M from cybercrime victims
news.summary: The 2024 indictment, now unsealed, accuses three Russians and two web hosts of aiding hackers and profiting from cybercrime.

news.title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
news.summary: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.

news.title: Rime picks up $24M Series A to help enterprises field customer calls
news.summary: Rime is handling over 100 million calls each month across multiple companies.

news.summary: With storage and memory prices still at an all-time high, we’re happy to tell you about a solid deal on a good laptop when we find one, rare as they are. Best Buy is selling the HP OmniBook X Flip 2 in 1 for $999.99 (usually $1,649.99) with an Intel Core 7 Ultra CPU, 16GB […]

news.title: Apple’s reportedly raising the price for AppleCare Plus on Macs and iPads
news.summary: An AppleCare Plus subscription for a Mac or iPad will cost more soon, with prices going up by $0.50 per month or $5 per year for new sign-ups while remaining the same for existing subscribers, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. Gurman says that under the new AppleCare Plus pricing, "a plan for a new 13-inch […]

news.title: Valve says iFixit will keep selling Steam Deck batteries after all
news.summary: Valve has been incredibly friendly to customers who need repairs - which is why it was so surprising to hear that Valve was already discontinuing the battery for the Steam Deck LCD handheld. It would have meant you could no longer just buy a battery from iFixit and install it yourself. Why would Valve stop […]

news.title: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
news.summary: The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company's Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). In a lawsuit reported earlier by Reuters, xAI claims Terry Wayne Harwood "knowingly and intentionally used Grok to circumvent safeguards, alter nonconsensual images, and generate and distribute CSAM," breaching the […]

news.title: Brendan Carr plans to let broadcast giants dominate the airwaves
news.summary: The Federal Communications Commission will vote next month on whether a single company can own broadcast stations that reach more than 39 percent of US TV households. In a Breitbart op-ed on Wednesday, Republican Chair Brendan Carr announced an August 6th vote to end the national ownership cap rule, which was intended to prevent one […]

news.title: Roblox is shutting down its video chat service
news.summary: Roblox will be shutting down Roblox Connect, its video calling service introduced in 2023. Roblox Connect let you video chat with other people using your Roblox avatar, which would be able to mimic the movements you were making in real life. You could also run around with people on the call in a shared virtual […]

news.title: AI slop movies are the new direct-to-video cash grabs
news.summary: This weekend, cinephiles across the world will march to their local theaters to feast their eyes on Christopher Nolan's new adaptation of The Odyssey. It's on track to rake in anywhere between $80-$100 million in just a few days. People are clearly excited to see how Nolan uses cutting-edge filmmaking tech to make the Homeric […]

news.summary: Bryan, a food broker from Michigan, wasn't sure if he'd be able to make it to urgent care in time. He started feeling off on Thursday, and by Saturday, he was having to use the bathroom every 15 to 30 minutes. "It's no joke about the explosive diarrhea," Bryan, who asked that his last name […]

news.title: Something’s glowing on the Pixel 11’s camera bar
news.summary: A new teaser for Google's upcoming Pixel 11 lineup reveals that the phones will feature some kind of glowing orb on the camera bar, as reported by 9to5Google. Google's store page for the Pixel 11 has a short video that shows the glowing, color-shifting orb to the one side of the camera bar. The store […]

news.title: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
news.summary: Suno data obtained in a hacking incident has exposed that the AI music generator was trained by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from online audio platforms, including YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius, 404 Media reports. Given that Suno has avoided revealing what's in its training datasets and how they were acquired, this a rare […]

AAPL.fact_check: Apple의 AI 서비스가 중국에서 공식 승인되었다는 뉴스는 사실이며, 이는 Alibaba와의 협력으로 이루어졌다. AppleCare+ 가격 인상 소식도 Bloomberg와 The Verge에서 확인된 사실이다.
AAPL.sentiment_reason: Apple의 AI 서비스 승인과 관련된 긍정적인 뉴스가 많았으나, 주가가 이미 목표가를 초과한 점과 중립적인 시장 심리가 종합적으로 반영되었다.
AAPL.key_insight: Apple이 중국 시장에서 AI 서비스 승인을 받으면서, 경쟁이 치열한 중국 스마트폰 시장에서의 입지가 강화될 가능성이 있다. 이는 Apple의 글로벌 AI 전략에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있다. 그러나 AppleCare+ 가격 인상은 소비자들에게 부정적인 반응을 일으킬 수 있다.
AAPL.recommendation_reason: 현재 주가가 목표가를 초과하고 있어 추가 상승 여력이 제한적일 수 있다.
risk_factors: AppleCare+ 가격 인상으로 인한 소비자 불만
AAPL.summary_one_line: Apple의 중국 AI 서비스 승인으로 글로벌 전략에 긍정적 영향을 기대할 수 있으나, 주가는 이미 목표가를 초과하여 관망이 필요하다.

MSFT.fact_check: Jim Cramer의 발언은 Citi의 긍정적 평가와 상반되지만, 공식적으로 Copilot의 성능에 대한 부정적 평가는 확인되지 않았습니다. Microsoft의 AI 활용 보안 패치 발표는 공식 확인된 사실입니다.
MSFT.sentiment_reason: 전반적인 뉴스는 긍정적이며, Fear & Greed 지수는 중립적이고, Stocktwits의 Bullish 비율도 균형을 이루고 있습니다.
MSFT.key_insight: Microsoft는 AI를 활용한 보안 강화로 기술적 우위를 점하고 있습니다. Copilot에 대한 시장의 의견은 엇갈리지만, 전반적인 기술 혁신은 긍정적입니다. 투자자들은 Microsoft의 AI 전략이 장기적으로 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있음을 주목해야 합니다.
MSFT.recommendation_reason: Microsoft의 기술 혁신과 강력한 시장 지위는 긍정적인 투자 기회를 제공합니다.
MSFT.summary_one_line: Microsoft의 AI 혁신은 장기적으로 긍정적인 투자 기회를 제공합니다.

GOOGL.fact_check: Google의 타사 앱 스토어 허용은 공식 발표된 사실로, 시장 경쟁을 촉진할 수 있습니다. Pixel 11의 새로운 기능은 공식 티저로 확인되었습니다.
GOOGL.sentiment_reason: 긍정적인 뉴스와 중립적인 시장 심리가 결합되어 긍정적입니다.
GOOGL.key_insight: Google의 타사 앱 스토어 허용은 사용자 선택권을 확대하고, 플랫폼 경쟁력을 강화할 수 있습니다. 또한, Pixel 11의 새로운 기능은 소비자 관심을 끌 가능성이 큽니다. 이러한 요소는 주가 상승에 긍정적으로 작용할 수 있습니다.
GOOGL.recommendation_reason: 긍정적인 뉴스와 시장의 강력한 매수 추천이 결합되어 매수를 추천합니다.
risk_factors: 타사 앱 스토어 허용으로 인한 보안 문제
GOOGL.summary_one_line: Google의 혁신적인 변화는 주가 상승의 기회가 될 수 있습니다.

AMZN.fact_check: AWS 고위 임원의 퇴사는 공식 확인된 사실이며, 이는 회사의 클라우드 부문에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 8-K 공시도 공식적으로 제출된 문서입니다. 나머지 뉴스는 직접적인 영향을 미치지 않습니다.
AMZN.sentiment_reason: 뉴스에서 긍정적인 요소와 부정적인 요소가 혼재되어 있으며, Fear & Greed 지수는 중립적이고 Stocktwits의 Bullish 비율도 중립적입니다.
AMZN.key_insight: 아마존의 클라우드 부문에서의 인사 변화는 주목할 만한 요소입니다. 그러나 전반적인 시장 심리는 중립적이며, 주가는 여전히 상승 여지를 가지고 있습니다. 분석가들의 목표가와 추천은 긍정적입니다.
AMZN.recommendation_reason: 시장의 중립적인 심리와 최근 뉴스의 영향으로 관망이 적절합니다.
risk_factors: AWS 고위 임원의 퇴사로 인한 내부 불안
AMZN.summary_one_line: 아마존은 현재 중립적 시장 심리 속에서 관망이 추천되며, 클라우드 부문에서의 변화가 주목됩니다.

NVDA.fact_check: Nvidia의 AI 가속기 시스템이 생산 중이며 고객에게 전달될 예정이라는 Huang의 발언은 공식 확인된 사실입니다. Nokia와의 협력 발표는 긍정적이지만, 과장된 부분은 없습니다.
NVDA.sentiment_reason: 뉴스의 긍정적 내용과 중립적인 시장 심리, 그리고 Stocktwits의 50% 긍정 비율을 종합하여 점수를 산정했습니다.
NVDA.key_insight: Nvidia는 AI 기술을 활용한 네트워크 기술을 통해 데이터 전송량을 두 배로 늘릴 수 있는 혁신을 발표했습니다. 이는 기술 발전과 시장 점유율 확대에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 그러나 현재 주가는 목표가에 비해 낮아 추가 상승 여력이 존재합니다.
NVDA.recommendation_reason: Nvidia의 기술 혁신과 시장 내 강력한 입지를 고려할 때 매수 추천이 적절합니다.
NVDA.summary_one_line: Nvidia의 AI 혁신과 시장 내 입지를 고려할 때, 현재 주가는 매수 기회로 보입니다.

META.fact_check: Jim Cramer의 기술주 랠리에 대한 경고는 과장된 측면이 있으며, META의 경우 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천이 공식적으로 확인된 사실이다.
META.sentiment_reason: 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천과 중립적인 시장 심리가 긍정적인 영향을 미쳤다.
META.key_insight: META의 주가는 현재 긍정적인 분석가 의견과 함께 상승세를 보이고 있다. 그러나 기술주 전반에 대한 시장의 신중한 태도는 여전히 존재한다. 투자자들은 META의 장기적인 성장 가능성을 고려해야 한다.
META.recommendation_reason: 분석가들의 목표가와 강력한 매수 추천이 긍정적이다.
risk_factors: 기술주 전반에 대한 시장의 신중한 태도
CNN Fear & Greed 지수의 중립적 상태
META.summary_one_line: META는 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천을 받고 있으며, 긍정적인 주가 목표가 기대된다.

TSLA.fact_check: Tesla의 최근 사고 관련 뉴스는 NTSB가 확인한 사실로, 회사의 초기 발표와 일치합니다. 다른 뉴스는 Tesla와 직접 관련이 없습니다.
TSLA.sentiment_reason: 중립적인 시장 심리와 분석가들의 긍정적인 목표가가 종합적으로 반영되었습니다.
TSLA.key_insight: Tesla의 주가는 최근 사고에도 불구하고 비교적 안정적입니다. 분석가들은 여전히 긍정적인 목표가를 제시하고 있습니다. 시장의 중립적인 심리 상태가 주가에 큰 영향을 미치지 않고 있습니다.
TSLA.recommendation_reason: 현재 시장 심리가 중립적이며, 주가는 안정적이기 때문입니다.
risk_factors: Tesla의 자율주행 기술 관련 안전성 문제
TSLA.summary_one_line: Tesla는 현재 중립적인 시장 심리 속에서 안정적인 주가를 유지하고 있습니다.

market_summary.market_summary: 오늘 시장은 중립적인 심리 속에서 다양한 기술 주식들이 주목받고 있습니다. 특히 AI 관련 혁신이 주요 기업들에 긍정적인 영향을 미치고 있습니다.
market_summary.top_mover_reason: Nvidia는 AI 혁신과 시장 내 강력한 입지로 인해 매수 기회로 평가받고 있습니다.
market_summary.today_strategy: 투자자들은 AI 혁신을 주도하는 기업에 주목하면서도, 목표가를 초과한 종목에 대해서는 신중한 접근이 필요합니다. 시장의 중립적 심리를 고려하여 장기적인 투자 기회를 탐색하는 것이 좋습니다.

daily_insights.Topic_Title: Apple의 AppleCare+ 가격 인상과 글로벌 메모리 가격 상승
daily_insights.Full_Summary: Apple이 AppleCare+ 서비스의 월간 가격을 소폭 인상한 것은 글로벌 메모리 가격 상승의 영향을 받은 것으로 보입니다. 이는 소비자들에게 추가적인 비용 부담을 줄 수 있으며, Apple의 수익성에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 이러한 가격 인상은 Apple의 다른 서비스 및 제품 가격 정책에도 영향을 줄 가능성이 있습니다.
daily_insights.AI_Impact_Reason: Apple의 가격 인상은 수익성에 긍정적 영향을 미칠 수 있지만, 소비자 부담 증가로 인한 부정적 반응도 예상되어 주가에 중립에서 약간 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 것으로 보입니다.
